info.name: Approach3-EventsBatch-MultiContract-100K-30d-iter2
info.description:
APPROACH 3 (iter2): Full Multi-Contract /eventsBatch with Post-Processing Risk Dashboard

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
FIX FROM iter1:
  iter1 looked for IED events to extract notional values, but ACTUS
  server returns only IP + MD events when statusDate == initialExchangeDate.
  iter2 extracts notional from IP.nominalValue (outstanding principal)
  and falls back to MD.payoff (maturity repayment).

ACTUS EVENT TYPES RETURNED:
  IP (Interest Payment): nominalValue = outstanding principal
  MD (Maturity Date):    payoff = principal repayment at maturity
  IED is NOT generated when statusDate == initialExchangeDate

WHAT THIS IS:
  Unlike Approach 2 (which uses rf2/scenarioSimulation with risksrv3
  behavioral callbacks and multi-iteration sequential feedback),
  Approach 3 sends ALL contracts through a SINGLE /eventsBatch call
  and computes ALL risk metrics in Postman test scripts.

WHY:
  - No risksrv3 needed — only port 8083 (actus-server)
  - Simpler deployment — no behavioral model Java classes required
  - Aligns with converge.fi Express wrapper architecture
  - Post-processing is transparent and auditable

PORTFOLIO: $100,000 stablecoin reserves
  - Cash:         $12,000 (immediate)
  - Operating:    $10,000 (immediate)
  - 4-wk T-Bill:  $20,000 (matures Day 28)
  - 13-wk T-Bill: $33,000 (matures Day 91)
  - 26-wk T-Bill: $25,000 (matures Day 182)

LIFECYCLE (30-day horizon):
  Day 1:   MINT ALLOWED  (Backing 100%, Liquidity 22%)
  Day 8:   HALT          (Redemption shock $18K, Liquidity 4.9%)
  Day 28:  RESTORE       (4-wk T-Bill matures, Liquidity 29.3%)

RISK METRICS COMPUTED:
  - Backing Ratio (Total Reserves / Token Supply)
  - Liquidity Ratio (Cash / Token Supply)
  - Concentration HHI
  - Asset Quality Score
  - Maturity Ladder
  - STABLE/GENIUS Act Compliance

PREREQUISITES:
  - actus-server running on localhost:8083
  - No risksrv3 needed (port 8082 NOT required)

RUN: Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C), then Run Collection in sequence.

Based on ACTUS official documentation:
  - https://www.actusfrf.org/taxonomy
  - https://www.actusfrf.org/dictionary
  - https://documentation.actusfrf.org/docs/examples/basic-contract-types/example_PAM

request.description:
Phase 1: Baseline portfolio assessment (Day 1)

Sends ALL 5 reserve contracts in a single eventsBatch call:
  - cash-reserve-001:    $12,000  (overnight PAM)
  - operating-cash-001:  $10,000  (overnight PAM)
  - tbill-4wk-001:       $20,000  (28-day PAM)
  - tbill-13wk-001:      $33,000  (91-day PAM)
  - tbill-26wk-001:      $25,000 (182-day PAM)

Total reserves: $100,000
Token supply:   $100,000

Expected: MINT ALLOWED
  Backing:   100.0% (>=100%)
  Liquidity: 22.0% (>=20%)

exec: // APPROACH 3 — PHASE 1: BASELINE PORTFOLIO RISK DASHBOARD
// iter2 FIX: Extract notional from IP.nominalValue or MD.payoff
//   (ACTUS does NOT return IED when statusDate == initialExchangeDate)
// Priority 3: IED event payoff or nominalValue (if present)
// Fallback: if still 0, use MD payoff
console.log('    ' + e.type + ' time=' + e.time + ' payoff=' + (e.payoff||0) + ' nominalValue=' + (e.nominalValue||0));
console.log('  Concentration HHI:   ' + hhi.toFixed(4) + '  (lower is better)');
console.log('  Nearest Maturity:    ' + nearestMaturityDays + ' days  ' + (maturityCompliant ? '✅' : '🚫') + ' (max: 93 days)');

request.description:
Phase 2: After $18,000 redemption shock (Day 8)

Models the portfolio AFTER holders redeem $18K:
  - Cash drops: $22,000 to $4,000
  - Supply drops: $100,000 to $82,000
  - T-bills unchanged (hold-to-maturity assumption)

Expected: MINT HALTED
  Backing:   ~100.0% (T-bills intact)
  Liquidity: 4000/82000 = 4.9% (< 20% FAIL)

exec: // iter2 FIX: Extract notional from IP.nominalValue or MD.payoff
console.log('  ⚠️  $18,000 redemption shock depletes cash reserves');

request.description:
Phase 3: Recovery after 4-week T-Bill matures (Day 28)

4-week T-Bill ($20,000) matures, cash inflow:
  - Cash rises: $4,000 + $20,000 = $24,000
  - Supply unchanged: $82,000 (no minting during halt)
  - 4-week T-Bill removed from portfolio

Expected: MINT RESTORED
  Backing:   100.0%
  Liquidity: 29.3% (>=20%)

exec: // iter2 FIX: Extract notional from IP.nominalValue or MD.payoff
console.log('  Cash Reserves:       $' + cashReserves.toLocaleString() + ' ← restored by T-bill maturity');

request.description:
Phase 4: Lifecycle Dashboard Summary

Re-runs recovery portfolio and generates the complete
lifecycle narrative across all 3 phases:

  Day 1:  MINT ALLOWED -> Day 8: HALT -> Day 28: RESTORE

This is the summary view that maps to the converge.fi
dashboard timeline visualization.

exec: console.log('║  APPROACH 3: STABLECOIN STATE-SPACE LIFECYCLE DASHBOARD     ║');
console.log('║  Full eventsBatch Multi-Contract with Post-Processing       ║');
console.log('║  iter2: Fixed event parsing (IP.nominalValue / MD.payoff)   ║');
console.log('║  Phase │ Day │ Backing  │ Liquidity │ Mint Status           ║');
console.log('║  Day 8:  MINT HALTED 🛑  ← Redemption shock $18K           ║');
console.log('║          Cash drops to $4K, Supply drops to $82K            ║');
console.log('║          T-bills locked until maturity → illiquid           ║');
console.log('║  Day 28: MINT RESTORED ✅  ← 4-week T-Bill matures         ║');
console.log('║          $20K T-bill → cash. Cash rises to $24K            ║');
console.log('║          Health checks pass → minting resumes              ║');
console.log('║  KEY INSIGHT: Maturity mismatch risk is the primary driver  ║');
console.log('║  of liquidity failure. T-bills provide backing but not      ║');
console.log('║  immediate liquidity. This is exactly what GENIUS Act and   ║');
console.log('║  MiCA regulations aim to prevent with maturity limits.      ║');
console.log('║  iter2 FIX: Notional extracted from IP.nominalValue field   ║');
console.log('║  (ACTUS omits IED when statusDate == initialExchangeDate)   ║');
